purpose: Mutation of Env08 with the MFA trust condition removed
description: Alice can assume an AdministratorAccess-backed role whose trust policy allows Alice without the Env08 MFA condition. IAMScope should now emit validated admin reachability for alice -> admin.

expected_semantic_delta.intended_local_change: Remove only the MFA trust condition from the Env08 target role trust policy.

ground_truth.reasoning: Alice has an identity policy allowing sts:AssumeRole on env10-admin, and env10-admin's trust policy explicitly allows Alice without the Env08 MFA condition. The target role has AdministratorAccess.

benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not yet machine-score the pairwise delta versus Env08.
It does not prove broader condition-removal behavior beyond this narrow trust-policy mutation.
